ddls:
CREATE TABLE "car_parks" (
  "carpark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car park */,
  "carpark_number" TEXT /* Car park number assigned by the city */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the car park */,
  "total_lots" INTEGER /* Total number of parking lots in the car park */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the car park */,
  "capacity_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of total lots that are currently available */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection for safety and maintenance */,
  "accessibility_options" TEXT /* Options for accessibility (e.g., disabled parking, electric vehicle charging stations) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the car park (e.g., phone number, email) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("carpark_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parking_availability" (
  "availability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each availability record */,
  "carpark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car park */,
  "lots_available" INTEGER /* Number of available parking lots */,
  "update_datetime" TEXT /* Date and time when the availability was last updated */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data record */,
  "predicted_lots_available" INTEGER /* Predicted number of available lots based on historical data */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the availability data (e.g., sensor, manual update) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("availability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parking_availability_carpark_id FOREIGN KEY ("carpark_id") REFERENCES car_parks ("carpark_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, operator, regular user) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "date_registered" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language for notifications and interface */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reservations" (
  "reservation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reservation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the reservation */,
  "carpark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car park */,
  "lot_number" INTEGER /* Number of the reserved parking lot */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the reservation */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the reservation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the reservation (e.g., pending, confirmed, cancelled) */,
  "reservation_type" TEXT /* Type of reservation (e.g., one-time, recurring) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of payment (e.g., paid, pending, failed) */,
  "cancellation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for cancellation if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reservation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_carpark_id FOREIGN KEY ("carpark_id") REFERENCES car_parks ("carpark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lot_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who used the parking lot */,
  "carpark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car park */,
  "lot_number" INTEGER /* Number of the parking lot used */,
  "entry_time" TEXT /* Time when the vehicle entered the car park */,
  "exit_time" TEXT /* Time when the vehicle exited the car park */,
  "amount_paid" REAL /* Amount paid for the parking */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, mobile payment) */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., completed, refunded) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lot_transactions_carpark_id FOREIGN KEY ("carpark_id") REFERENCES car_parks ("carpark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lot_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "car_park_operations" (
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operation record */,
  "carpark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car park */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator responsible for the car park */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the operation */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the operation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the operation (e.g., active, closed) */,
  "last_inspection_result" TEXT /* Result of the last inspection (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "next_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_car_park_operations_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES car_park_operators ("operator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_car_park_operations_carpark_id FOREIGN KEY ("carpark_id") REFERENCES car_parks ("carpark_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "car_park_operators" (
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operator */,
  "operator_name" TEXT /* Name of the operator */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the operator */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the operator */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the operator */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the operator for more information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lot_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status record */,
  "carpark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car park */,
  "lot_number" INTEGER /* Number of the parking lot */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the parking lot (e.g., available, occupied, reserved) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the status was updated */,
  "last_occupied_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last occupied the lot */,
  "last_occupied_datetime" TEXT /* Date and time when the lot was last occupied */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lot_status_last_occupied_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("last_occupied_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lot_status_carpark_id FOREIGN KEY ("carpark_id") REFERENCES car_parks ("carpark_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., availability, reservation confirmation, cancellation) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "sent_time" TEXT /* Time when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, read) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device the notification was sent to (e.g., mobile, web) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "car_park_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "carpark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car park */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5 stars) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "review_source" TEXT /* Source of the review (e.g., user, third-party app) */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review is from a verified user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_car_park_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_car_park_reviews_carpark_id FOREIGN KEY ("carpark_id") REFERENCES car_parks ("carpark_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "car_park_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "carpark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car park */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was uploaded */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., entrance, exit, interior) */,
  "image_size" INTEGER /* Size of the image in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_car_park_images_carpark_id FOREIGN KEY ("carpark_id") REFERENCES car_parks ("carpark_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "car_park_closures" (
  "closure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each closure record */,
  "carpark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car park */,
  "closure_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the closure (e.g., maintenance, special event) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the closure */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the closure */,
  "closure_status" TEXT /* Status of the closure (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  "affected_lots" TEXT /* List of affected lots during the closure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("closure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_car_park_closures_carpark_id FOREIGN KEY ("carpark_id") REFERENCES car_parks ("carpark_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "car_park_pricing" (
  "pricing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pricing record */,
  "carpark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car park */,
  "price_per_hour" REAL /* Price per hour for parking */,
  "min_price" REAL /* Minimum price for a parking session */,
  "max_price" REAL /* Maximum price for a parking session */,
  "discount_rate" REAL /* Discount rate for long-term parking (e.g., 0.1 for 10% discount) */,
  "pricing_type" TEXT /* Type of pricing (e.g., hourly, daily, monthly) */,
  "pricing_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the pricing plan starts */,
  "pricing_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the pricing plan ends */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pricing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_car_park_pricing_carpark_id FOREIGN KEY ("carpark_id") REFERENCES car_parks ("carpark_id")
)
